mapper.select: SELECT id, coupon_code, title, detail, expire_at, is_visible AS visible, created_at, updated_at FROM site_coupons WHERE is_visible = true
SELECT id, coupon_code, title, detail, expire_at, is_visible AS visible, created_at, updated_at FROM site_coupons
SELECT id, coupon_code AS couponCode, title, detail, expire_at AS expireAt, is_visible AS visible, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM coupons WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_coupons ( coupon_code, title, detail, expire_at, is_visible, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{couponCode}, #{title}, #{detail}, #{expireAt}, #{visible}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE site_coupons
coupon_code = #{couponCode},
title = #{title},
detail = #{detail},
expire_at = #{expireAt},
is_visible = #{visible}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE site_coupons SET is_visible = #{visible}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
